description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial-style metal container, commonly known as a shipping or storage container. Its exterior is painted a weathered, dark red with visible patches of paint wear and surface scuffing, suggesting prolonged outdoor use. The container features vertical paneling along its long sides, while the short ends display reinforced doors with visible locking mechanisms and latches. Small warning labels and utility markings are present on the door panels, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The structure is robust, likely constructed from corrugated steel, and designed to withstand heavy loads and harsh environments. This type of container is typically used for transporting goods or as a secure storage unit in urban, industrial, or construction settings.
description: A large, weathered red metal shipping container with reinforced doors and visible utility markings, designed for secure storage or transport in urban or industrial environments.
description_view_0: The long side of the container is visible, showing vertical paneling and significant paint wear but no doors or openings.
description_view_1: The short end of the container is shown, featuring two reinforced doors with locking mechanisms, latches, and visible warning labels.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, similar to view 0, with vertical paneling and weathered paint, but no doors or markings.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, nearly identical to view 1, with two reinforced doors, locking mechanisms, and utility markings.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: warning labels and utility markings on door panels
attribute_handles_or_grips: integrated door handles and latches on short ends
